notes: Gold ADDENDUM DQ rules for the 4 additive columns on consumable.career_branches (related_experience_years, related_experience_tier, source_experience_years, experience_delta_years). Existing career_branches rules remain in governance/dq-rules/gold-futureproof-engine.json. Null-rate threshold RELAXED from spec's 5% to 15% -- Silver base.onet_experience_profiles covers 765 BLS SOCs but career_branches targets span the broader 867-BLS-SOC target space (via BLS OOH), so some branches will not have experience data. Actual null rate will be confirmed by @dq-engineer execution; if < 5% observed, this P1 may be tightened to match the spec's original 5% in a follow-up. experience_delta_years uses NULL-propagating semantics (per approved §Zone 3 CASE expression); range rule only applies WHERE both sides are non-null.

rules.name: career_branches: related_experience_years null rate < 15%
rules.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN (SUM(CASE WHEN related_experience_years IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)) < 15.0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS violation FROM consumable.career_branches
rules.description: The null rate for related_experience_years across consumable.career_branches must be below 15%. Nulls occur when a target BLS SOC in career_branches has no matching row in base.onet_experience_profiles (the 765-row Silver experience table has narrower coverage than the target-occupation space).
rules.rationale: Spec §Zone 3 originally set threshold at < 5%, but coverage math says: base.onet_experience_profiles covers 765 BLS SOCs (EDA), while career_branches targets are derived from the broader BLS OOH + O*NET crosswalk universe (~867 BLS SOCs). Worst-case null rate is (867-765)/867 ~= 11.8%. Relaxed threshold to < 15% to account for branches whose target is outside ETE's 765-SOC footprint. @dq-engineer will measure actual null rate on first execution; if < 5%, this may tighten to spec's original 5% threshold in a follow-up. Threshold: null rate < 15%.
rules.source_eda_ref: governance/eda/raw-onet-experience-eda.md §2. Occupation Coverage (765 BLS SOCs vs broader target space)

rules.name: career_branches: experience_delta_years range -12 to 12 (NULL-propagating)
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM consumable.career_branches WHERE related_experience_years IS NOT NULL AND source_experience_years IS NOT NULL AND experience_delta_years IS NOT NULL AND (experience_delta_years < -12.0 OR experience_delta_years > 12.0)
rules.description: Where both related_experience_years and source_experience_years are populated, experience_delta_years must be in [-12, 12]. Max possible delta is 12-0 = 12 (senior target from zero-experience source); min is 0-12 = -12 (entry target from senior-level source). NULL-propagating semantics per §Zone 3 CASE expression: if either side is NULL, delta is NULL and this rule skips the row.
rules.rationale: Approved midpoint mapping (governance/approvals/onet-experience-requirements-open-decisions.md): experience_years_typical range is [0, 12]. Therefore delta = related - source range is [-12, +12]. Spec §Zone 3 said '-10 <= delta <= 15' but that was drafted before the 'Over 10 years' midpoint was pinned to 12 -- true range is [-12, +12]. WHERE clause enforces NULL-propagation per §Zone 3 CASE expression. Threshold: 0 violations.

rules.name: career_branches: senior tier consistency (related_experience_years >= 8)
rules.sql: SELECT * FROM consumable.career_branches WHERE related_experience_tier = 'senior' AND (related_experience_years IS NULL OR related_experience_years < 8.0)
rules.description: When related_experience_tier = 'senior', related_experience_years must be >= 8 (the 'senior' tier floor per approved thresholds). A senior-tiered branch with < 8 years or NULL years indicates tier/years derivation inconsistency between the Silver transformer and the Gold join.
rules.rationale: Approved tier thresholds (governance/approvals/onet-experience-requirements-open-decisions.md): senior = 8+ years. Silver derives tier deterministically from years, and Gold joins both from the same Silver row, so any inconsistency is a transformer bug. Spec §Zone 3 states this rule explicitly. Threshold: 0 violations.
